evals.prompt: How do I standardize API responses in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: Use TransformInterceptor to wrap all successful responses in { statusCode, data, meta }. Never return raw ORM entities. Map to Response DTOs first.

evals.prompt: How do I validate nested DTO objects in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: Use @ValidateNested() combined with @Type(() => TargetDto) from class-transformer on nested properties to trigger deep validation.

evals.prompt: How do I implement pagination in NestJS APIs?
evals.expected_output: Use PageOptionsDto (page/take/order) and PageDto<T> (data/meta). Document with ApiExtraModels + getSchemaPath for generics in Swagger.

should_not_trigger: How do I set up NestJS modules?
How do I connect NestJS to PostgreSQL?
How do I structure a Spring Boot API?
